name: Rice-Cake Porridge WW
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine all ingredients except rice cakes.
2. Cook over high heat until the mixture comes to a boil.
3. Remove from heat and stir in rice cake pieces.
4. Cover and let stand until rice cakes soften, about 5 minutes.
Weight Watcher Exchanges: 1/2 Milk, 1 Bread, 1 Fruit, 20 Optional Calories.
Nutritional Analysis per serving: 189 calories, 7 g protein, 4 g fat, 42 g carbohydrates, 157 mg calcium, 85 mg sodium, 2 mg cholesterol, 1 g dietary fiber (excluding rice cakes).
